html:
2026-0307
2026-04-09PSRoyal Canadian Mounted Police ActAppointment of an interim Chairperson of the Civilian Review and Complaints Commission for the Royal Canadian Mounted PoliceAppointment of the Honourable W. Brent Cotter, S.O.M., K.C., of Halifax, Nova Scotia, to be Chairperson of the Civilian Review and Complaints Commission for the Royal Canadian Mounted Police, on an interim basis, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of six months, effective April 15, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of an interim Chairperson of the Civilian Review and Complaints Commission for the Royal Canadian Mounted Police
precis: Appointment of the Honourable W. Brent Cotter, S.O.M., K.C., of Halifax, Nova Scotia, to be Chairperson of the Civilian Review and Complaints Commission for the Royal Canadian Mounted Police, on an interim basis, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of six months, effective April 15, 2026.
